OBSERVATION

Something Interesting We Found

Everyone sends macaron stickers in WeChat groups daily

Happy, bored, or slacking off — there's always a sticker

Macaron already has a personality
but only in WeChat

Our goal: make the product more personal — a proactive companion

FEATURE 01 · EXPRESSION

AI Can Send Stickers Too

BEFORE AFTER

← drag to compare →

Not just static stickers — dynamically generated from emotion

03
FEATURE 01 · HOW IT WORKS

4-Layer Instant Assembly

🎨 Decoration
😊 Expression
🧁 Body
🌈 Background
Pre-defined Layers
↓ detect emotion →
1
Decompose into 4 Dimensions
Every sticker = Background color + Body shape + Expression face + Decoration accessory. Each dimension is independently defined and swappable.
2
Emotion Vector Detection
LLM reads conversation context and outputs a 6-dimensional emotion score. When the score crosses a threshold, the system knows exactly which mood to express.
3
Instant Layer Assembly
Pick the matching layer for each dimension → snap together instantly. No generation delay. Happy context → happy face. Sad context → comfort face. Every reply feels alive.

Pre-built layers + real-time assembly = zero-latency emotion

04

It speaks like a human now.
But can it think like one?

05
FEATURE 02 · PERSONALITY

Thinking with Character

Macaron
我想吃火锅但又怕长痘，要辣但别太辣，最好有甜品但我在减肥，人均别超100但也别太便宜...
脑子转起来了
给你找了家宝藏店~ 牛阵·鲜牛肉火锅（走路22分钟）菌汤锅底不上火，人均82。别再纠结了，再纠结今晚只能吃泡面了！
THINKING
脑子转起来了...
想到了！等等...没想到
奶油夹心都在沸腾了
SEARCH

掘地三尺给你挖
侦探马卡龙上线了
TOOL CALL
撸起袖子开搞

07
FEATURE 03 · PROACTIVE CARE

You Don't Ask — It's Already There

Time-based Greetings
"夜深了...你还没睡呀？"
Good morning, afternoon, evening — a different greeting awaits every time you open the app
Tap to Say Hello
"你回来啦！快摸摸我～"
Responds based on how long you've been away — every tap is a surprise
Birthday Wishes
"生日快乐！今天想许什么愿望？"
On your birthday, it sends wishes before your friends do
Holiday Specials
"圣诞快乐！有什么心愿吗？"
Seasonal skins, proactive greetings, and interactive holiday cards

It doesn't wait for you to speak — it's always there

08
TECH HIGHLIGHTS

How It Works

User Input → LLM Agent → Emotion JSON → Mamoji Render → Chat Stream
Emotion Detection
Single LLM API call with function calling constraint. 6 emotion labels + emotional_score threshold. No extra classifier — LLM decides.
4-Layer Rendering
Background CSS swap + Body PNG hue-rotate + Expression SVG viewBox + Decoration Fluent Emoji map. Anchor JSON aligns all layers.
Presence Engine
State machine: idle → thinking → search → stream → emotion. Eye-tracking cursor (15 lines JS). 30s idle → sleep + hover wake. One React component for all states.

Powered entirely by LLM — zero additional model dependencies
